title: St1 Nordic Refinery Uses Honeywell Technology To Produce Sustainable Aviation Fuel
content: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) has today announced that the St1 Refinery has started using Honeywellâ€™s EcofiningTM technology to produce sustainable aviation fuel (SAF). The biorefinery in Gothenburg, Sweden will provide SAF to regional airlines, including Braathens Regional Airlines. The production of SAF with Ecofining technology also supports Honeywellâ€™s alignment of its portfolio to three powerful megatrends, including the energy transition and future of aviation.
author: Analysts Account
